query: SELECT s.id, s.title, s.status, s.isPublic, s.fileUrl, u.id as userId, u.name, u.artistHandle FROM songs s LEFT JOIN users u ON s.userId = u.id ORDER BY s.id ASC LIMIT 100;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4ArHJRmPMKBQTkw.2e571ac7914f --database 7kHkqvMBX9Ci3pQfWTqqQr --execute SELECT s.id, s.title, s.status, s.isPublic, s.fileUrl, u.id as userId, u.name, u.artistHandle FROM songs s LEFT JOIN users u ON s.userId = u.id ORDER BY s.id ASC LIMIT 100;
